title: The Real Mechanics Behind Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator in Kenya, trying to sell ebooks online without the restrictions of PayPal. You've researched the best platforms to sell digital downloads without fees, but none of them seem to work in your country. Meanwhile, Gumroad and Payhip are off-limits due to their strict KYC requirements. You're stuck, unsure of how to get your digital products to your customers. This is where transaction logs for digital product sales come in – a game-changer for creators worldwide.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs for digital product sales are a crucial component of any e-commerce platform. Essentially, they're a record of every order, payment, and delivery made on your platform. Think of it like a spreadsheet, but automated and updated in real-time. This allows creators to keep track of their sales, identify any discrepancies, and even automate certain tasks, like sending receipts or delivery confirmations. For digital creators with limited resources, this level of transparency and control is priceless.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At the heart of transaction logs lies the Admin Dashboard, a powerful tool developed by Unchained Commerce. This dashboard provides creators with real-time analytics, order management, and transaction logs, all in one place. By integrating the Admin Dashboard with your digital storefront, you can access a comprehensive view of your sales and customer activity, from anywhere in the world. The Admin Dashboard is the key to unlocking the true potential of your digital product sales – and it starts with a one-time payment of $29.99.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Transaction logs are designed for digital creators who face restrictions or limitations when using traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. By providing a secure and reliable way to track sales and customer activity, transaction logs empower creators to build a thriving digital business, even in the most challenging regulatory environments. From Nigeria to Venezuela, and from Bangladesh to Ethiopia, creators worldwide can now sell their ebooks, courses, and digital products with confidence.
Transaction logs are the key to unlocking the true potential of your digital product sales.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard is built on top of the Core Shop Engine, a robust and scalable e-commerce platform developed by Unchained Commerce. This engine automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, eliminating the need for payment processor accounts. Meanwhile, the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration allows customers to make payments using their preferred cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin or Ethereum. By integrating these components, creators can build a seamless and secure digital storefront that meets the needs of their global audience.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the mechanics behind transaction logs for digital product sales, it's time to take action. With transaction logs, you can focus on what matters most – creating great digital products and engaging with your audience.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Real-time analytics and order management are just the beginning with the Admin Dashboard.

Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
By integrating transaction logs with your digital storefront, you can build a seamless and secure experience for your customers.
